name: Dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It is spoken of in Sinnoh myths as a deity that began moving when Dialga was born.
originLore: Dialga crystallized the river of time itself. When its heart began to beat, entropy became measurable and history acquired a forward arrow. Sinnoh myths still treat its roar as the first clock of creation.

lore.celestialConcordance: Where Dialga walks, seconds braid into law. Opposing timelines collapse into a single sovereign flow.

quantumResonators.name: Roar of Time
quantumResonators.description: Forces local chronal fields into a locked linear vector.

quantumResonators.name: Adamant Lattice
quantumResonators.description: Hardens temporal coordinates against paradox intrusion.
